findings.description: PascalCase class names appearing in s2 content are absent from hints: `CM311AC1Component` (used in doRW11AC0301 Action to query data) and `SqlResultSet` (used multiple times in doRW11AC0301 to hold query results).
findings.source_evidence: Source doRW11AC0301: `CM311AC1Component comp = new CM311AC1Component(); SqlResultSet sysAcct = comp.selectSystemAccount(userId); SqlResultSet users = comp.selectUsers(userId); SqlResultSet permissionUnit = comp.selectPermissionUnit(userId); SqlResultSet ugroup = comp.selectUgroup(userId);`
